The '''Jeodu''' were a tall, [[Color/Legends|brown]]-skinned [[Species/Legends|species]]. Their heads were topped with a conical white [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]]; for this reason, the name "Dequc" (meaning "Whitehead") was common among them. A Jeodu, [[Dequc]] became the leader of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], in an attempt to resurrect the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization, and many Jeodu joined the organization.

Besides Dequc, other Jeodu included [[Eoodso]], [[Traff (Jeodu)|Traff]], [[Chackra]], and [[Clomv]].
